content.en:
Time flies.

After an Archean Era.

Ye Tian finally comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five Haven of the third level and successfully passed the third level.

He thought there was a fourth level, but it turned out that there was no fourth.

Rumble!!!!

Dense black texts on the other side emerged from nothingness, and then poured into Ye Tian's immeasurable will, which was received by his inheritance.

"More than 10,000 Haven inheritances on the other side!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

I didn't expect the harvest to be so big this time!

With so much Haven inheritance on the other side, he can definitely easily create the art of the other side, and his strength will increase to a certain extent at that time.

At that time, he encountered a powerhouse with seven bone transformation realm combat power, even if he couldn't beat it, there should be no problem in saving his life.

It's just a place where the Haven heritage is inherited, and nothing else.

As a result, he soon left.

After coming out of this hole void, he saw the six Eternal Giant Apes with eight bone transformations.

These Eternal Giant Ape also asked if they had comprehended the Alpha Text, and he replied that they had comprehended two kinds.

If the answer is no, it is impossible to stay for so long.

So, he replied and realized two kinds.

Anyway, they couldn't tell him was lying.

Knowing that Ye Tian had comprehended the two Havens on the other side, these Eternal Giant Ape of the Eight Bone Transformation Realm were very excited.

Looks like they have plans to focus on cultivating him.

Ye Tian was the last to come out, so after he came out, these Eternal Giant Apes were ready to leave here.

They didn't intend to defend this place either, as it was too far away from the territory of the Eternal Great Ape.

And.

They can't enter this place of the Haven inheritance on the other side for the time being, so there's no point in guarding here.

......

After some time.

The Eternal Great Ape Clan returns to their lands.

At this time, they thought about dealing with the matter of the ancient well on the other side, but it was too late, and they couldn't find any information, and they didn't even know who the enemy was.

Of course.

The Eternal Great Ape Clan didn't care about this either, and they chose to engrave the Beyond Side Script on a special material - the Beyond Stone.

The Stone of the Other Shore can carry the power of the Haven on the Other Shore and can be preserved for a long time.

In this way, the other Eternal Great Aes can continue to comprehend more of the Haven of the Other Shore.

The most important thing is that those Eternal Giant Apes of the Eighth Bone Transformation Realm can also comprehend more Haven on the Other Shore, so that they can hopefully create the Technique of the Other Shore.

Chen Yang also gave two Haven on the other side, just two Haven on the other side, which is nothing.

Besides, he still wants to mix in with the Eternal Great Ape Clan to make some profits!

Therefore, it is also good to put this vest here for the time being.

......

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian continued to comprehend one after another on the other side.

Although it is more difficult to comprehend the Haven on the Other Side, it will take a little more time to understand all of these Haven on the Other Side.

Moreover, with his current understanding of the Haven on the Other Side, it shouldn't be difficult to create a Technique of the Other Shore, and it is not an ordinary Technique of the Other Shore, so it should be quite good.

So, in the following years, he comprehended the Haven on the other side and created the art of the other side.

The art of creating the other side is also more dangerous, if you don't have the treasure to protect the immeasurable will, if you are not careful, the immeasurable will will collapse.

Ye Tian didn't have any treasures on his body to protect the immeasurable will, but he didn't care, the immeasurable will would collapse when it collapsed, as long as he changed to a copy body, it would not be a big loss for him.

After many attempts, he finally created a pretty good art of the other side.

The body of the mist on the other side!

Once this technique is unleashed, it can form a body of mist on the other side, which can be used to replace death.

For example, if you are fatally attacked or injured, you can replace it with a body of mist on the other side, so that you will not be injured.

Therefore, mastering the other side of the fog body, such as the other side, the ability to save life skyrockets, and unless the strength gap is very large, it will be killed.

"With the Misty Body of the Other Shore, even if I only have four Bone Transformation Realms, I will be able to fight head-on with the ordinary Seven Bone Transformation Realm combat power without being killed!" Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

It's not enough to have just one other side of the art, and you need to create several other side of the art to deal with all kinds of battles.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

Ye Tian comprehended more and more Beyond Haven, and also created one technique after another, and his strength was slowly increasing.

Of course.

He also used the golden water he captured on the other side to continuously temper his immeasurable bones, allowing one immeasurable bone after another to complete five bone transformations.

Just when he had exhausted the golden water on the other side, he had already completed five bone transformations from more than two hundred immeasurable bones in his body.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to collect the gold water and other resources on the other side to refine his immeasurable bones.

For example, the Eternal Great Ape Clan still has a lot of resources.

Ye Tian sometimes got some resources from the Eternal Giant Ape Clan, which were useful resources for cultivators, but they were not of much help to the Eternal True Beast of the Eternal Giant Ape.

This is a resource that the Eternal Great Ape Clan does not value, so he can easily get his hands on it and then use it for his true body replica.

In this way, as the years passed, his immeasurable bones gradually completed five bone transformations.

Finally, on this day, his cultivation had been raised to the extreme of the Fourth Bone Transformation Realm, and he was only half a step away from the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm.

He is the top four bone transformations, and it is very difficult for him to break through to the five bone transformation realms.

Although he still has Canghe Beads, the remaining Canghe Beads may not be able to help him break through to the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm.

Because when he was impacting the four bone transformation realms in the three bone transformation realms, he used Canghe beads.

Now, Canghe Zhu's effect on him has been greatly reduced.

He calculated that if he used all the remaining Canghe beads, the success rate would only be thirty percent.

"I have to find a way to get other resources that will help me break through before I can hope to become a fifth-time bone transformation realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He also searched for the Eternal Great Ape Clan, but did not find this resource.

......

this day.

Eternal Ancient Demon City, a piece of news came out.

A top cultivator force in the land of Eternity is preparing to hold an auction in the Eternal Ancient Demon City, and as long as you hold 10 million primary grade Eternal Ancient Gold, you are eligible to participate.

"Ten million primary-grade eternal gold!"

Ye Tian was also extremely surprised.

The threshold for participating in the ranking meeting is too high, and many bone transformation realms may not even be able to make up tens of thousands of primary-grade eternal ancient gold, unless they sell their own resources and treasures.

After all, even a Canghe pearl was only worth three million primary eternal ancient gold.

Ten million primary eternal ancient gold needs four Canghe beads!
